description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in urban tactical attire, featuring a fitted jacket with visible seam and panel details, and a pair of straight-cut pants. The jacket appears padded or armored, especially around the chest and shoulders, and has a high collar. The figure wears sturdy, mid-calf boots and has a holster with a sidearm strapped to the right thigh, suggesting a security or law enforcement role. The face is clean-shaven with a well-groomed, voluminous hairstyle, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. The overall build is athletic, and the clothing is form-fitting, designed for mobility and protection in an urban environment.
description: Athletic male adult in tactical urban attire with a padded jacket, holster, and boots, suggesting a security or law enforcement role.
description_view_0: Front view shows the padded jacket, holster on the right thigh, and the figure's facial features and hairstyle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the jacket, holster, and the straight-cut pants with boots.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the detailed back panel of the jacket and the overall fit of the clothing.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the holster more clearly and the contour of the jacket and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical jacket with padded panels, straight-cut pants, and a thigh holster
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
